Get Started In Production

Why We Do This

We believe independent business owners deserve tech that actually serves them. Tech that gives you back your time, simplifies your operations, and lets you focus on what you love—your customers and your craft. Every business is different, so every solution should be too. That’s why we build custom. We’re here to make your tech work for you, so you can do what you do best.

construction

Custom Built

No templates, no shortcuts

Launch in Weeks

handshake

Ongoing Support

Services

We serve all independent businesses — from solo operators to multi-location restaurants. Pick the plan that fits your needs.

Solo Operator

$1,500 - $2,500

A clean, simple online presence for independent professionals. Fast turnaround, no complexity.

  • Simple branded website (1-3 pages)
  • Basic booking widget integration
  • Mobile responsive design
  • Contact form setup
  • Up to 2 weeks turnaround
  • 30 days post-launch support

Best for: Nail salons, barbershops, stylists, tattoo artists, personal trainers, etc.

Custom Website

$2,500 - $3,500

A fully custom, multi-page site designed and built from scratch around your brand.

  • Multi-page custom design
  • Database-driven content (menus, products, etc.)
  • SEO optimization & content strategy
  • English/Spanish language toggle
  • Social media integration
  • 3-4 week turnaround
  • 90 days post-launch support

POS Integration

$3,500 - $4,500

Custom-engineered ordering and management systems that connect your entire operation.

  • Custom POS build or existing system integration
  • Real-time inventory sync
  • Kitchen display & ticket routing
  • API integration + authentication
  • Custom reporting dashboard
  • Staff training & onboarding
  • 90 days post-launch support
Best Value

Full Package

$5,000 - $6,000

Everything in Custom Website + POS — built together from day one for a seamless system.

  • Everything in both tiers included
  • Complete solution, one vendor
  • Unified design & data architecture
  • Priority support & quarterly check-ins
  • 6 months post-launch support

In Production

Laguna Website & POS Integration

A seamless custom website paired with a full custom management system including automated inventory alerts, strict order tracking, and dynamic delivery routing between all service points.
